cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write verbose alchemy-recipe diagnostics to the BepInEx console. Leave off for normal play.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
cfg.refill_last_mix.name: Refill Last Mix
cfg.refill_last_mix.desc: Press this at an alchemy mixing station to fill the slots with the ingredients you last used there, pulled from your inventory. Works for failure mixes too; anything you no longer have is left empty.
cfg.auto_refill_on_open.name: Auto-Refill On Open
cfg.auto_refill_on_open.desc: Automatically fill an alchemy mixing station with your last-used ingredients as soon as you open it.
cfg.refill_controller_button.name: Refill Last Mix Controller Button
cfg.refill_controller_button.desc: Controller button that refills an alchemy mixing station with your last-used ingredients. Set to None to use only the keyboard key.
